chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Transfer Application No.S-52 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 28.10.2022 Mr. Mushtaque Ali Tagar, advocate for applicant. Mr. Fayaz Hussain Sabki, APG. ----- Mr. Khadim Hussain Soomro advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.41; taken on record. By consent, this transfer application is allowed and the Sessions Case No.347 of 2018 (re: The State versus Muhammad Shabbir Khanzada) pending on the file of learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge Shaheed Benazirabad is hereby withdrawn and transferred to learned Sessions Judge Shaheed Benazirabad to proceed himself in these matters on day-to-day basis and dispose of the same in accordance with law within a period of one month and submit compliance report. Transfer application disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
